changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 删除手动测试中误添加的无效分类数据

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 删除手动添加的无效新闻公告
changeSet.sql:
SET NAMES utf8mb4;
DELETE FROM news WHERE id = 9 AND title = '撒的';

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 将手动创建的测试用户GGB替换为合理的校园用户孙婷
changeSet.sql:
SET NAMES utf8mb4;
UPDATE yonghu SET yonghuzhanghao = 'sunting', yonghuxingming = '孙婷', mima = '123456', xingbie = '女', idcard = '510101200501156789', age = 21, xinyuzhishu = '82', shoujihao = '18612349087', touxiang = 'upload/yonghu_touxiang9.jpg', sfsh = '是', shhf = '', vip = '是', vip_expire = '2026-12-31 23:59:59' WHERE yonghuzhanghao = 'GGB';

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 将GGB的乱填技能需求替换为合理的校园技能交换内容

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 将引用GGB的交换申请更新为引用孙婷
changeSet.sql:
SET NAMES utf8mb4;
UPDATE jiaohuanshenqing SET gongjirenzhanghao = 'sunting', gongjirenxingming = '孙婷', lianxifangshi = '18612349087', xuanzejinengbiaoti = 'C语言与数据结构教学' WHERE id = 23 AND gongjirenzhanghao = 'GGB';

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 修复GGB的充值记录和异常编号

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 将GGB的资料购买记录更新为孙婷

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 替换手动添加的无效学习资料为合理内容
changeSet.sql:
SET NAMES utf8mb4;
UPDATE xuexiziliao SET ziliaobiaoti = '商务英语写作与沟通技巧', ziliaoleixing = '全行业', ziliaoxiangqing = '本资料涵盖商务邮件撰写规范、会议纪要模板、项目汇报英文表达等实用内容，配合真实职场案例讲解，帮助提升英文工作沟通能力', jiage = 15 WHERE id = 25;

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: 补充交换记录10缺失的发布者/申请人提供技能字段
